title: Basic JavaScript SVG Manipulation
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript SVG Manipulation. Focus on implementing SVG elements (circle, rect, path, text) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript SVG Manipulation
description: Create a function that uses SVG elements (circle, rect, path, text) and SVG attributes vs CSS together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript SVG Manipulation Project
description: Build a small application that applies SVG elements (circle, rect, path, text), SVG attributes vs CSS, SVG viewBox and coordinates in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript SVG Manipulation
description: The following code has bugs related to SVG elements (circle, rect, path, text). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript SVG Manipulation
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with SVG elements (circle, rect, path, text) and SVG attributes vs CSS.
